ts/packages/runtime-bridge/src/mock.ts.rationale: MockRuntimeBridge remains the single fail-closed implementation of the RuntimeBridge interface until its capability groups are split behind the same contract.
ts/packages/runtime-bridge/src/mock.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any RuntimeBridge operation, mock capability group, or attempted baseline increase.
ts/packages/runtime-bridge/src/mock.ts.removalCondition: Remove after mock capability modules replace the consolidated implementation and all files fit the global cap.

ts/packages/app/src/index.ts.rationale: Application composition root still owns shell wiring while public behavior remains delegated to focused modules.
ts/packages/app/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any shell capability addition, composition owner change, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/app/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove after application shell state and wiring move into focused modules and the root becomes exports-only.

ts/packages/catalog-core/src/index.ts.rationale: Catalog DTOs and validators predate the barrel rule and remain consolidated pending schema-family modules.
ts/packages/catalog-core/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any catalog schema family, validator family, or attempted baseline increase.
ts/packages/catalog-core/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove after catalog schema and validation families move to focused modules and the root is exports-only.

ts/packages/devtools/src/index.ts.rationale: The compact devtools root contains its remaining implementation while protocol and panel work is still small.
ts/packages/devtools/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review when a second panel family lands, the root grows, or package ownership changes.
ts/packages/devtools/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove when devtools implementation moves behind focused panel and protocol modules and the root is exports-only.

ts/packages/editor-tools/src/index.ts.rationale: Editor read models and command builders predate the barrel convention and remain explicit at the package root.
ts/packages/editor-tools/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any editor capability family, command builder family, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/editor-tools/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove after editor read models and command builders move to focused modules and the root is exports-only.

ts/packages/electron-main/src/index.ts.rationale: The Electron package has one small host-capability implementation surface at its root.
ts/packages/electron-main/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any second host capability, lifecycle responsibility, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/electron-main/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove when host implementation moves to a focused module and the package root becomes exports-only.

ts/packages/native-bridge/src/index.ts.rationale: Native bridge root is the transport loader boundary pending complete generated transport glue.
ts/packages/native-bridge/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any loader responsibility, native transport export, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/native-bridge/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove when generated transport glue owns the loader implementation and the root is exports-only.

ts/packages/policy-core/src/index.ts.rationale: Policy-core root contains the tiny default policy implementation and no hidden runtime coupling.
ts/packages/policy-core/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review when another policy implementation or helper responsibility is added to the root.
ts/packages/policy-core/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove when the default policy moves to a focused module and the root becomes exports-only.

ts/packages/policy-examples/src/index.ts.rationale: Example policies remain colocated at the root while the example set is small and intentionally inspectable.
ts/packages/policy-examples/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review when a new example family lands, examples gain shared state, or the cap changes.
ts/packages/policy-examples/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove when examples split into named modules and the package root becomes exports-only.

ts/packages/render-projection/src/index..rationale: Render projection historically owned a focused retained read-model implementation at its root.
ts/packages/render-projection/src/index..reviewTrigger: Review on any retained projection family, renderer responsibility, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/render-projection/src/index..removalCondition: Remove once the retained projection implementation is fully modular and the root remains exports-only.

ts/packages/script-host/src/index.ts.rationale: Script host root owns the small sandbox runner implementation pending a dedicated runner module.
ts/packages/script-host/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any sandbox capability, host lifecycle responsibility, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/script-host/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove when sandbox runner implementation moves to a focused module and the root is exports-only.

ts/packages/script-sdk/src/index.ts.rationale: Script SDK root contains author-facing helpers pending separation of command and signal families.
ts/packages/script-sdk/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any SDK command family, signal family, stateful helper, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/script-sdk/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove after SDK commands and signals move to focused modules and the root is exports-only.

ts/packages/ui-dom/src/index.ts.rationale: DOM UI root still contains component helpers while panels and composition remain within one package.
ts/packages/ui-dom/src/index.ts.reviewTrigger: Review on any component family, stateful UI service, renderer coupling, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/ui-dom/src/index.ts.removalCondition: Remove after DOM components move to focused modules and the package root becomes exports-only.

ts/packages/wasm-replay-bridge/src/index.rationale: WASM replay bridge root owns its loader and facade boundary pending a dedicated loader module.
ts/packages/wasm-replay-bridge/src/index.reviewTrigger: Review on any WASM loader capability, replay facade responsibility, or baseline increase.
ts/packages/wasm-replay-bridge/src/index.removalCondition: Remove when loader and facade implementations move to focused modules and the root is exports-only.
